content: Regular exercise is associated with reduced risks of all the most deadly and debilitating chronic diseases.
Maintaining muscle mass with age is a common theme on The Peter Attia Drive podcast.
Dietary protein consumption is necessary to stimulate muscle protein synthesis (MPS).
Maximal muscle protein synthesis (MPS) is believed to occur within approximately 3 hours after protein ingestion.
Exercise training for five years reduces all-cause mortality in older adults according to the Generation 100 study.
The Peter Attia Drive podcast offers exclusive Ask Me Anything episodes and best-in-class show notes.
